ValidationRule.description: Escalation Periodicity (Months) should be greater than 0 and less than 25 and also negative numbers and decimal places are not allowed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(!$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c , OR( OR(leaseworks__Esc_Periodicity_Mos__c == 0, leaseworks__Esc_Periodicity_Mos__c > 24) , REGEX( TEXT( leaseworks__Esc_Periodicity_Mos__c ) , '[0-9]+[.]{1}[0-9]+' ), And( !ISBLANK(leaseworks__Esc_Periodicity_Mos__c ) , leaseworks__Esc_Periodicity_Mos__c < 0 ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a whole number between 1 and 24 for the periodicity.
